title: WFMFormat.exe
html:
WFMFormat.exe

Command-line tool used for pretty-print a dump file generated by Message Farm Analyzer tool.

Execute

Proxy execution of binary

WFMFormat.exe

Executes the file `tracerpt.exe` in the same folder as `WFMFormat.exe`. If the file `dumpfile.txt` (any content) exists in the current working directory, no arguments are required. Note that `WFMFormat.exe` requires .NET Framework 3.5. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
